tool_definitions.name: Bash
tool_definitions.description: Execute a bash command. Commands are validated against security classifiers before execution. Dangerous patterns (reverse shells, privilege escalation, injection vectors) are blocked. Use cwd to set the working directory.

steps.message: Use the Bash tool to run the command "echo hello-from-bash" and tell me the output.
